channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 World Cup Injury Tracker: Player Updates and Recovery Timelines
Do Antiparasitics Help Treat Pancreatic Cancer?
What Is a Heat Dome? How to Stay Safe During Extreme Heat
item.description: Learn what causes this weather phenomenon, why it can make heat waves more severe, and how to protect yourself when temperatures soar.

item.title: Resistance training is associated with lower risk of type 2 diabetes
item.description: 1. Resistance training among US adult health care professionals was associated with lower type 2 diabetes (T2D) risk, especially when performed consis...
